Executor only.         Advances the schedule and forwards `amountPerPeriod` to the recipient."},"fund(bytes32)":{"notice":"Top up a strategy's budget. Owner only. A Depleted strategy (auto-paused         for low funds) auto-resumes once it can afford a period again."},"getStrategiesBatch(bytes32[])":{"notice":"Read many strategies at once. Lets the executor pull a whole page in one         RPC call (pair with allIds) instead of one round-trip per id."},"getStrategy(bytes32)":{"notice":"Read a strategy. owner == 0x0 means it doesn't exist."},"getStrategyIds(address)":{"notice":"All strategy ids created by `owner`, newest last."},"pause(bytes32)":{"notice":"Pause an active strategy. Owner only."},"releaseForSwap(bytes32)":{"notice":"Release one period of a Swap strategy to the executor. Executor only.         The executor swaps `amountPerPeriod` off-chain (StableFX / App Kit) and         forwards the output token to the strategy owner."},"resume(bytes32)":{"notice":"Resume a paused strategy. Owner only. Next run is eligible immediately."},"setExecutor(address)":{"notice":"Set the authorized executor (the Woosh DCW wallet). Admin only."},"strategyId(address,uint256)":{"notice":"Deterministic id for an owner's strategy. Same (owner, salt) => same id."},"totalStrategies()":{"notice":"Total number of strategies ever created (for executor pagination)."},"transferAdmin(address)":{"notice":"Hand admin (executor-rotation rights) to a new key/multisig. Admin only.         Admin can ONLY rotate the executor; it can never move strategy funds."}},"notice":"On-chain automated strategies: recurring USDC payments and DCA swaps.         This contract is the source of truth (no off-chain DB). It custodies the         strategy's native USDC budget and stores the schedule, so an off-chain         executor only has to read due strategies from the chain and trigger them.         Two kinds:         - Payment: the contract itself forwards `amountPerPeriod` to `recipient`           every `intervalSeconds`. Fully trustless once funded.         - Swap (DCA): the swap rail (Circle StableFX / App Kit) is not callable           from a contract, so on each period the contract releases `amountPerPeriod`           to the authorized executor, which performs the swap off-chain and forwards           the output token to the owner. The executor is a Woosh-controlled DCW           wallet; the release is bounded to one period at a time and the schedule is           advanced atomically, so a misbehaving executor can never pull more than the           schedule allows.         Native USDC on Arc has 18 decimals and is the gas/value token, so amounts         are handled as msg.value (same model as WooshInvoiceRegistry).","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/WooshStrategyRegistry.sol":"WooshStrategyRegistry"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":false,"runs":200},"remappings":[]},"sources":{"src/WooshStrategyRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf3ebe903b187a3d8a9d789cbeaaba08fcbfd91e56c4600859e0076d73cf49d30","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1b59cdf34c8d01276f3897744e6e0c28d0b716b5aec2161d6ff0c659188f29b1","dweb:/ipfs/QmYH45GARHiLBh6my28C9zwXUUXFK39eytqsKA96f816sG"]}},"version":1}

params.periodsTotal: number of executions, or 0 for open-ended
params.recipient: Payment only: who receives each payment
params.salt: caller-chosen nonce for a unique id
params.tokenOut: Swap only: the target token address

allIds(uint256,uint256).notice: A page of all strategy ids. The executor scans these and filters by         status/nextRunAt off-chain to find due strategies.

cancel(bytes32).notice: Cancel a strategy and refund its remaining balance to the owner. Owner only.

create(uint256,uint8,address,address,uin.notice: Create and fund a strategy. msg.value is the initial budget.

executePayment(bytes32).notice: Execute one period of a Payment strategy. Executor only.         Advances the schedule and forwards `amountPerPeriod` to the recipient.

fund(bytes32).notice: Top up a strategy's budget. Owner only. A Depleted strategy (auto-paused         for low funds) auto-resumes once it can afford a period again.

getStrategiesBatch(bytes32[]).notice: Read many strategies at once. Lets the executor pull a whole page in one         RPC call (pair with allIds) instead of one round-trip per id.

getStrategy(bytes32).notice: Read a strategy. owner == 0x0 means it doesn't exist.

getStrategyIds(address).notice: All strategy ids created by `owner`, newest last.

pause(bytes32).notice: Pause an active strategy. Owner only.

releaseForSwap(bytes32).notice: Release one period of a Swap strategy to the executor. Executor only.         The executor swaps `amountPerPeriod` off-chain (StableFX / App Kit) and         forwards the output token to the strategy owner.

resume(bytes32).notice: Resume a paused strategy. Owner only. Next run is eligible immediately.

setExecutor(address).notice: Set the authorized executor (the Woosh DCW wallet). Admin only.

strategyId(address,uint256).notice: Deterministic id for an owner's strategy. Same (owner, salt) => same id.

totalStrategies().notice: Total number of strategies ever created (for executor pagination).

transferAdmin(address).notice: Hand admin (executor-rotation rights) to a new key/multisig. Admin only.         Admin can ONLY rotate the executor; it can never move strategy funds.
